subject: [PATCH v4 2/5] mm/memcontrol: flatten try_charge_memcg control flow

2026-06-23.patch_summary: This patch refactors the try_charge_memcg function in mm/memcontrol.c to simplify its control flow by separating the logic for memsw and memory page counters into distinct paths. The change is made to improve readability, but does not introduce any functional changes. With this flattening, it will be easier to follow the control flow when page_counter_try_charge becomes stock-aware.
